contactPage.title: Contact

imset.title: University Instructor
imset.institution: Maghreb Institute of Economic Sciences and Technology (IMSET)
imset.detail1: Teaching Microsoft Access, Microsoft Word and Algorithmics modules.
imset.detail2: Preparation of practical work, exams and teaching materials.
imset.detail3: Supervision and support of students in practical activities.
imset.detail4: Evaluation of projects and pedagogical follow-up of students.

mtouch.title: The M Touch – Luxury Jewelry & Makeup E-commerce
mtouch.detail1: Designed and developed The M Touch, a premium e-commerce platform specializing in handmade jewelry, glowy makeup, and adorable accessories from Tunisia.
mtouch.detail2: Built a full responsive Next.js frontend with modern UI/UX (Framer Motion animations, rose/gold gradient theme, live search & category filtering, favorites & cart system).
mtouch.detail3: Implemented a secure Spring Boot backend (Java, MySQL) with JWT authentication, role-based access, product management, image upload/compression, and secure payment integration.
mtouch.detail4: Created a complete admin dashboard for product CRUD, category management, order tracking, and user privileges.
mtouch.detail5: Optimized performance with lazy loading, image compression (Thumbnailator), and local filtering for instant results.

doctrina.title: Doctrina Space – Online Learning & Training Platform
doctrina.detail1: Designed and developed a full-featured e-learning platform for managing courses, categories, users, and multilingual content.
doctrina.detail2: Built a scalable backend with role-based access (Admin/User), course management, file uploads, and secure APIs.
doctrina.detail3: Implemented a dynamic multilingual system (i18n) enabling content translation from backend to frontend.
doctrina.detail4: Developed a modern admin dashboard for course creation, category management, image uploads, and platform configuration.

weefarm.title: WeeFarm – Mobile Community Platform for Tunisian Farmers
weefarm.detail1: Developed WeeFarm, a Flutter cross-platform app (iOS & Android) to connect Tunisian farmers for knowledge sharing, disease alerts, regional sales, and community engagement.
weefarm.detail2: Built full social feed with posts, comments, likes, reactions, and priority tagging.
weefarm.detail3: Implemented secure auth, image upload, real-time search, pull-to-refresh, Arabic RTL + French localization.
weefarm.detail4: Designed responsive UI with staggered animations and farmer-friendly UX.

crafthub.title: CraftHub – E-commerce Platform for Artisanal Products & Workshops
crafthub.detail1: Developed an innovative e-commerce platform dedicated to the sale of artisanal products and the reservation of creative workshops.
crafthub.detail2: Implemented a subscription-based model where each artisan must subscribe to a monthly plan.
crafthub.detail3: Integrated artificial intelligence modules to enrich user experience, improve content relevance, automate tasks, and optimize pricing.
crafthub.detail4: Features: category/region/style navigation, wishlist, secure payments, account management.

docusmart.title: DocuSmart – Intelligent Document Automation
docusmart.detail1: Microservices platform for banking document automation with Spring Boot, Angular and MongoDB.
docusmart.detail2: Integrated AI solutions (YOLOV8, PaddleOCR, LayoutLMv3) for invoice data extraction and contract authenticity verification.
docusmart.detail3: Implemented automated notifications and intuitive user interface.

reservation.title: Reservation Site
reservation.detail1: Full-stack reservation system with NestJS, ReactJS and React Native.
reservation.detail2: Real-time availability, billing integrations and automated email notifications.

daycare.title: Daycare Management Platform
daycare.detail1: Optimized web & mobile application with ReactJS and Flutter.
daycare.detail2: Improved planning, communication and real-time updates with Spring Boot.

odoo.title: Order Management Module (Odoo)
odoo.detail1: Creation of an Odoo module for automating purchase orders using Python and XML.
odoo.detail2: Streamlined ERP workflows and reduced manual processing time.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I am Manel Saidane, a software engineer passionate about full-stack development, artificial intelligence, and modern digital experiences.
about.paragraph2: I specialize in building scalable web and mobile applications using technologies such as Spring Boot, React, Flutter, Angular, NestJS, and modern DevOps tools.
about.paragraph3: My journey combines creativity, problem-solving, and innovation to deliver intelligent and user-friendly platforms across multiple domains including e-commerce, AI automation, and education.
about.paragraph4: I enjoy creating elegant digital solutions, learning new technologies, and transforming ideas into impactful real-world products.

ai.description: Intelligent chatbots, recommendations, and smart automation.
